title: Design Discovery Layer and Discovery-to-Delivery handoff contract
description: Evaluate Discovery Layer as a v3.x research track, including discovery question-set, breakthrough-pattern, assumption/anomaly artifacts, discovery judgment gate, completion criteria, flexibility rules, and a formal handoff packet that terminates in Need / Intent / Context for delivery runtime.
triage_notes: Defined Discovery scope, flexibility rule, completion and success criteria, judgment gate, and schema-backed runtime artifacts for judgment plus handoff-related records.
